ocr_findings.description: System concept diagram (showing ハードウェア and ソフトウェア inside a システム box) replaced by img-0.jpeg placeholder. Diagram label '● システムの概念図' is captured in OCR.
Study-point box ('業務とは' with 学習のポイント icon) rendered correctly; mascot image replaced by img-1.jpeg placeholder — decorative only.

reviewer_notes: Page is lesson 06-01 covering system development definition, SLCP context, and a '業務とは' study-point box. All prose text including key exam vocabulary (システム要件定義, ソフトウェア保守, システムテスト, システム方式設計) faithfully reproduced. Both diagrams are image placeholders with negligible text content loss.
